RepGest		1254843	1258642	Other hand moves to right show location of other part of instrument
RepGest		1258642	1261302	Hand moves slightly up and down repeatedly to emphasize location of note
RepGest		1261688	1262906	Hand move sideways and up to visualise moving up the scale
RepGest		1262906	1265511	Hand move sideways once and down onto table to show moving up one note
RepGest		1265511	1266945	Other hand moves sideways in other direction to show one note moving in other direction
RepGest		1266945	1268026	Original hand moves a little to the right side again to show progression of notes played
